overview.description: The Hedgeye Fourth Turning ETF (HEFT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in long/short alternatives. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation by employing long/short strategy informed by Fourth Turning generational theory, which points to change in norms with opportunities and risks. The fund actively varies its exposure across different classes. HEFT was launched on Nov 20, 2025 and is issued by Hedgeye.
